specializations: Cellulose-based natural film formers and texture polymers
Rheology modifiers for skincare, hair care, and color cosmetics
Bio-based texture solutions meeting clean beauty demands
HEC, HPC, and HPMC polymer systems
Thickeners and stabilizers for diverse formulation types
product_highlights: Natrosol™ hydroxyethylcellulose (HEC) — versatile thickener and film former
Benecel™ HPMC — natural polymer for texture and stability
Broad range of cellulose-derived natural texture solutions
notes: Ashland's personal care division offers a comprehensive range of texture-modifying polymers with a strong emphasis on cellulose-based natural solutions. Their Natrosol™ hydroxyethylcellulose, Klucel™ hydroxypropylcellulose, and Benecel™ HPMC are widely used as thickeners, film formers, and texture modifiers in skincare, hair care, and color cosmetics. Ashland's natural polymer range meets growing consumer demand for bio-based texture solutions.
